expo.name: K21 Calorie Tracker
expo._assets_note: Icon/splash/adaptive-icon fields are intentionally omitted: no binary assets ship in this repo, and referencing missing files would break `expo start`. TODO: add ./assets/icon.png (1024x1024), ./assets/splash.png, and ./assets/adaptive-icon.png, then wire up the standard icon/splash config here.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: K21 uses your camera to photograph meals so it can estimate calories and macros.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: K21 needs access to your photo library to analyze pictures of food you have already taken.

plugins.photosPermission: K21 needs access to your photos to analyze pictures of food.
plugins.cameraPermission: K21 uses your camera to photograph meals for calorie estimation.
